info.title: Lumisovellus API
info.description: Unified backend API for Lumisovellus - Snow condition tracking and rescue coordination system

get.description: Returns the current status of the API server

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Create a new user account with email and password

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Authenticate user with email and password

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Get new access token using refresh token

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Send password reset email to user

200.description: Password reset email sent (if email exists)

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful
Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Retrieve the authenticated user's profile information

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

put.description: Update the authenticated user's profile information

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful
Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Verify if the provided token is valid and return user information

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Retrieve all ski segments with their coordinates and terrain information. Supports filtering by bounding box, search, and updatedSince.

parameters.name: search

schema.description: Search term to filter segments by name

parameters.description: Search term to filter segments by name

parameters.name: updatedSince

schema.description: Return only segments updated since this date (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.description: Return only segments updated since this date (ISO 8601 format)

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.summary: Create or update a guide update for a segment (Admin only)
post.description: Creates a new guide update or updates the existing one for a segment. Only admins can create guide updates.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.summary: Get all snow types (primary and secondary)
get.description: Retrieve all snow types including both primary and secondary snow types in a flat list.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Create a new snow type with the provided information. Requires authentication and admin role.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Retrieve all primary snow types (primarySnowTypeId: null) for reviews. Each primary snow type includes an array of its secondary snow types.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.summary: Add secondary snow types to a snow type
post.description: Associate one or more existing snow types as secondary types for the specified snow type. All entities are SnowTypes - "secondary" refers only to the relationship. Requires authentication and admin role.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Retrieve observations (reviews and guide updates) for all segments from the last N days, grouped by segment. Supports pagination of segments.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back for reviews and guide updates

parameters.description: Number of days to look back for reviews and guide updates

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of user reviews to return per segment

parameters.description: Maximum number of user reviews to return per segment

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.summary: Get observations for a specific segment
get.description: Retrieve guide updates and user reviews for a specific segment within the requested time window.

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back for this segment

parameters.description: Number of days to look back for this segment

parameters.name: limit

schema.description: Maximum number of user reviews to include

parameters.description: Maximum number of user reviews to include

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.summary: Create a review for a segment
post.description: Submit a snow condition review for a specific segment

hazards.description: Array of hazards found on the trail (e.g., ["stones", "branches"])

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Update or create mobile user location data for tracking and rescue purposes

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Update the battery status for a mobile user

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Retrieve the role and permissions for a mobile user

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

post.description: Update the role for a mobile user

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Get a list of all users (admin only)

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Get details of the currently authenticated user

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful
Indicates if the request was successful

delete.description: Delete a user and all related data (admin only)

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Returns the average for supported weather items within the requested period.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Returns the minimum temperature within the requested period.

parameters.name: item

schema.description: Weather item to get minimum for

parameters.description: Weather item to get minimum for

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Returns the maximum temperature or wind speed within the requested period.

parameters.name: item

schema.description: Weather item to get maximum for

parameters.description: Weather item to get maximum for

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.description: Returns the change in snow depth between the start and end of the requested period.

parameters.name: item

schema.description: Weather item to calculate change for

parameters.description: Weather item to calculate change for

parameters.name: days

schema.description: Number of days to look back from now

parameters.description: Number of days to look back from now

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

get.summary: Filter days with average temperature above threshold
get.description: Returns the dates within the requested period where the daily average temperature exceeded the threshold.

success.description: Indicates if the request was successful

primarySnowTypeIds.description: Array of primary snow type IDs (max 2)

secondarySnowTypeIds.description: Array of secondary snow type IDs (max 2)

hazards.description: Array of hazards found on the trail (e.g., ["stones", "branches"])

Hazard.description: Hazard type found on the trail

colour.description: Snow type colour in hex format

secondarySnowTypeIds.description: Array of secondary snow type IDs

points.description: Polygon or polyline of the segment

secondaryTypes.description: Array of secondary snow types for this snow type

guideUpdate.description: Guide update for the segment, if available

userId.description: User ID who created the review

days.description: Number of days included in the window
